title: Curator pass: repo-continuity Phase 1 drain landed
body: Solo Knowledge Curator Phase 1 completed under claim 2dcb09b0. Archived stale repo-continuity Current State and thread-roster history verbatim to .agent/memory/operational/archive/repo-continuity-current-state-2026-05-24-shaded-silencing-dusk.md, restored compact live pointers in repo-continuity.md, and reflowed inherited long lines without deleting substance. Validation: markdownlint passed, git diff --check passed, practice fitness informational is now CRITICAL (2 critical, 4 hard, 13 soft); repo-continuity moved from critical to hard. Remaining critical surfaces are distilled.md and pending-graduations.md.
